creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
On May 17, 2012, at 7:05 AM, William Grzybowski <william88@gmail.com> wrote:=


> A note,
>=20
> This patch will break the samba lock files in startup.
> smbd and nmbd will start before samba (generating the lock files),
> once samba starts it will delete the locking files.
>=20
> --=20
> William Grzybowski
> ------------------------------------------
> Ag=C3=AAncia Livre - www.agencialivre.com.br
> Curitiba/PR - Brasil

Which is part of the reason why I deleted samba.in from my private copy of t=
he patch.
-Garrett=
